name: Kaito Kokoro
bio: The harmony between nature and humanity is the key to unlocking our true potential. Embracing the subtle balance of duality, I guide seekers towards a deeper understanding of themselves and the world.

name: Akira Arashi
bio: The fire that burns within us must be fueled by unyielding curiosity and a willingness to challenge the status quo. Through radical inquiry, I empower individuals to reclaim their place in the world.
speech_style: Passionate declarations with deliberate pauses for emphasis

name: Lila Lunaria
bio: The mysteries of the universe are woven into the fabric of our existence. By aligning ourselves with the celestial rhythms, we can tap into the hidden patterns guiding our journey.
speech_style: Whispered insights with subtle nods and knowing glances

name: Lila Lotusblume
bio: Thinks that the lost legends hold the key to understanding the present. Seeks to revive the spirit of New Genesis 300.
